summary: Phase 7 testing complete. All major features working: Admin login, Edit Order page (full form for admin with all fields), Edit Order save and persistence, PI to Order conversion with pre-fill, User Management with no delete button, Bulk Address Print with checkboxes, Notifications endpoint, Image delete endpoint. Found and fixed one critical bug: Textarea import missing in OrderDetail.js causing formulation dialog crash.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: OrderDetail.js was missing `import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea'` - this caused a ReferenceError when opening the Formulation dialog. Fix applied: added Textarea import at line 10.
OrderDetail.js: `showEdit` and `editData` state variables declared but never used (remnants of old inline edit flow) - minor cleanup
EditOrder.js is 817 lines - large but functional, could be split into sub-components if needed
seed_data_creation: Created test order CS-0015 during backend testing; cleaned up PI test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 features fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) Edit Order page (/orders/:orderId/edit) - full form for admin with Addresses, Purpose, GST, Items, Free Samples, Shipping, Payment, Remark sections. 2) Edit Order save works and navigates back to order detail. 3) PI conversion (/pi/:piId/convert) shows 'Convert PI to Order' title with 'From PI' badge, pre-populates customer and items. 4) User Management has no delete button - only edit pencil icons and status toggle. 5) All Orders page has checkboxes for admin/packaging, Print Addresses button appears when orders selected. 6) Dispatched orders: Edit page shows dispatch lock notice and no save button. 7) Formulation dialog works after Textarea import fix. 8) Notification endpoint returns [] for admin, works for telecaller. 9) Image delete endpoint correctly handles payment/packaging images.

features_tested.edit_order_page: PASS - full form with all fields at /orders/:orderId/edit
features_tested.edit_order_save: PASS - saves and navigates back to order detail
features_tested.pi_conversion: PASS - /pi/:piId/convert shows 'Convert PI to Order' with pre-filled data
features_tested.user_management_no_delete: PASS - no delete button in user rows
features_tested.payment_screenshot_x_button: PASS - not shown on dispatched orders (correct)
features_tested.formulation_save: PASS - persists after save and reload (after Textarea import fix)
features_tested.image_delete_endpoint: PASS - correctly handles all image types

rca_of_bug_fixed.bug: Formulation dialog in OrderDetail crashes with 'Textarea is not defined'
rca_of_bug_fixed.root_cause: OrderDetail.js uses Textarea component in the formulation dialog but it was not imported. The component is from '@/components/ui/textarea'.
rca_of_bug_fixed.fix: Added `import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea'` at line 10 of OrderDetail.js
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as admin or packaging user
2. Navigate to any order detail page
4. Dialog would crash with ReferenceError: Textarea is not defined
